channel.title: Follow Builders — X/Twitter
channel.description: AI builders' latest tweets, curated by follow-builders

item.title:
Peter Yang (@petergyang): If you want to know what the next generation expects from AI just use Codex with a 7 year old.
"Wha...
item.description:
If you want to know what the next generation expects from AI just use Codex with a 7 year old.
"What do you mean it can't build a pet dragon raising game instantly? I'm bored" https://t.co/M9wWoIGUtA
Bio: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people | Join 140K+ readers at https://t.co/XYKTmGVH14 | Product at Roblox ❤️ 65 🔁 3

item.title: Peter Yang (@petergyang): Are there good human-curated skill repos for design, coding, product, etc that's not "here's 100 ski...
item.description:

Bio: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people | Join 140K+ readers at https://t.co/XYKTmGVH14 | Product at Roblox ❤️ 84 🔁 3

item.title:
Nan Yu (@thenanyu): The entire West Coast of the United States from Santa Cruz on up. SF, Marin, Seattle, Portland…
If ...
item.description:
The entire West Coast of the United States from Santa Cruz on up. SF, Marin, Seattle, Portland…
If only we built housing so that people could actually live there https://t.co/k4eBM6IgcU
Bio: head of product @linear ❤️ 13 🔁 0

item.title: Nan Yu (@thenanyu): The problem with being on the very bleeding edge of adoption is you’re going to constantly be changi...
item.description:
The problem with being on the very bleeding edge of adoption is you’re going to constantly be changing how you do things as the industry learns.
The sweet spot is just a couple steps behind. Whatever is relatively new, but survives all of the churn.
Bio: head of product @linear ❤️ 55 🔁 2

item.title:
Nan Yu (@thenanyu): This is another way of saying the same thing, believe it or not
https://t.co/mhISOTPiX4
item.description:
This is another way of saying the same thing, believe it or not
https://t.co/mhISOTPiX4
Bio: head of product @linear ❤️ 2 🔁 0

item.title: Amanda Askell (@AmandaAskell): What I'm learning from flight simulators is that it would be a bit boring to be an amateur cessna pi...
item.description:
What I'm learning from flight simulators is that it would be a bit boring to be an amateur cessna pilot but a lot of fun to be an amateur fighter jet pilot.
Bio: Philosopher & ethicist trying to make AI be good @AnthropicAI. Personal account. All opinions come from my training data. ❤️ 76 🔁 3

item.title:
Amjad Masad (@amasad): 2000s: every company is an internet company
2010s: every company is a software company
2020s: ever...
item.description:
2000s: every company is an internet company
2010s: every company is a software company
2020s: every company is an AI company
2025+: every company is a cybersecurity company
Bio: ceo @replit. civilizationist ❤️ 369 🔁 26

item.title: Aaron Levie (@levie): Great read. AI lets you get tremendous leverage that wasn’t available before in almost any domain. ...
item.description:
Great read. AI lets you get tremendous leverage that wasn’t available before in almost any domain.
That means we’re at a unique moment in history where anyone with a high level of ambition and core skills in any area can overcome a lot of historical experience requirements for their role.
This can apply to anyone who’s junior or senior, but it’s pretty sweet that you can do far more than you could have accomplished as a newer employee than even a couple years ago. The people that take advantage of this will get ahead massively.
And the companies that find this talent within or outside should put them in key positions to get as much out of them as possible. These people will seem strange and from the future, but they will help you figure out where things are going. Everyone company should be doing whatever they can to find them.
Bio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI ❤️ 396 🔁 40

item.title: Garry Tan (@garrytan): Releaseing GBrain v0.22 - lots of fixes to search and retireval and a new eval system (gbrain-evals ...
item.description:
Releaseing GBrain v0.22 - lots of fixes to search and retireval and a new eval system (gbrain-evals is now a separate repo to prevent checkout bloat) https://t.co/qVAQjQeReV
Bio: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop ❤️ 41 🔁 3

item.description:

item.title: Zara Zhang (@zarazhangrui): When I sit down at my computer and start typing, that's not the beginning of writing. It's the LAST ...
item.description:
When I sit down at my computer and start typing, that's not the beginning of writing. It's the LAST step. 80% of the writing is already done. It just happened in my head.
- Writing ≠ generating text - Building product ≠ writing PRDs - Designing ≠ making mockups - Engineering ≠ writing code
Bio: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. GitHub: https://t.co/KCuEajezlL YouTube: https://t.co/8xzbGWtf6w ❤️ 75 🔁 7

item.title: Nikunj Kothari (@nikunj): Every time I pass by my neighbors side door I get this visceral feeling this is a portal to another ...
item.description:
Every time I pass by my neighbors side door I get this visceral feeling this is a portal to another universe.. https://t.co/wmLKvqlRnw
Bio: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧 ❤️ 52 🔁 0

item.title:
Nikunj Kothari (@nikunj): Brevity and clarity is what’s missing in most writing..
I’ll go weeks without writing something pub...
item.description:
Brevity and clarity is what’s missing in most writing..
I’ll go weeks without writing something publicly because I feel like I’m putting the onus of my muddy thoughts on the reader.
The best writing is able to communicate cleanly the crux of the matter and share a thread that’s simmering but not explored fully.
Writing is still easier since you can edit and reframe anytime. I’m in awe of folks who are able to speak clearly and on the spot on any topic.
One day I hope to get there 🤞
Bio: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧 ❤️ 84 🔁 1

item.title:
Peter Steinberger (@steipete): Summarize 📝0.14.0 is out.
GPT-5.5 Fast mode via `--fast`, Reddit thread extraction in the browser e...
item.description:
Summarize 📝0.14.0 is out.
GPT-5.5 Fast mode via `--fast`, Reddit thread extraction in the browser extension, local PDF `--extract`, and fixes for auto model config + Meta site compatibility. https://t.co/sbqbYupQ9Y
Bio: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world. @OpenClaw🦞 + @OpenAI ❤️ 192 🔁 12

item.title:
Peter Steinberger (@steipete): CodexBar 🎚️ 0.23 is out:
Mistral support, Claude Designs/Daily Routines usage, Cursor Extra usage, ...
item.description:
CodexBar 🎚️ 0.23 is out:
Mistral support, Claude Designs/Daily Routines usage, Cursor Extra usage, GPT-5.5 pricing, cleaner widgets/menus, and a bunch of reliability fixes. https://t.co/X4FXCEmAFG
Bio: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world. @OpenClaw🦞 + @OpenAI ❤️ 214 🔁 13
